claim: TL;DR Latest stable [Caddy](https://github.com/caddyserver/caddy) ⭐ 72k (Apr 2026) is v2.11.2, published 2026-03-06
The HTTP-01 and TLS-ALPN-01 challenges are enabled by default; DNS-01 is opt-in because it needs DNS-provider credentials
Over time, it learns which challenge type is most successful and will begin to prefer it first, but will fall back to other available challenge types if necessary."
DNS-01 is the only ACME challenge type that does not auto-enable, because it requires credentials for the DNS provider
v2.11.2 is a bug-fix/enhancement release: reverse-proxy fixes, metrics-performance work, zstd support in log rolling, and CVE patches in forwardauth and varsregexp placeholder expansion
